published.text:
### Hero
Heading: AI Automation Consultant for Alberta Businesses
Body: Whether you are in Calgary, Edmonton, Red Deer, Lethbridge, or anywhere else in Alberta, the operational bottlenecks are the same. Leads go cold because follow-up is slow. Appointments fall through the cracks. Your team spends hours on admin work that should run itself. We build AI-powered automations that handle it.
Sub: Below: what we automate, which Alberta industries we work with most, how the process works, and how to tell if this is the right fit for your business.

### Core sections
- The bottlenecks we see most often across Alberta service businesses — and the automations that fix them:
- Lead follow-up and response
- Appointment scheduling
- CRM cleanup and automation
- Operations and internal workflows

### FAQ
Subhead: Practical answers about working with an AI automation consultant in Alberta

### Final CTA
Heading: Ready to automate the busywork?
Body: Book a 30-minute call. We will look at your current operations, identify the highest-impact automation opportunities, and give you a clear picture of what it would take to build them.

edits.description: Published as part of the bounded first programmatic SEO batch for dmytroai.com.
Structured for both SEO and GEO: direct answer opening, sectioned decision content, FAQ, and proof-adjacent linking.
Avoids fake case studies or invented industry results.
Written for commercial intent, not generic educational traffic.
